title: Inventory
description: Standalone item records — equipped and carried. Items carry catalog-ref facts + quantity + charges.max (reference only). Live-play state (attunement, grip, charges.remaining, ammunition, effects) lives in MODIFIER. Content-neutral: catalog-driven.

derived_from_core.description: Hash of the CORE sheet this inventory was derived from. Null when hand-built.

equipped.description: Items currently worn/wielded, keyed by body-slot identifier (catalog). Slot vocabulary is catalog-driven, not enumerated here.

backpack.description: Carried-but-not-equipped items — mundane and magic — with quantity. Includes slotless items (Ioun Stones: backpack + MODIFIER attunement).

inventoryItem.description: A self-describing item with a sheet-local unique id. Minimum: id + name + category. The DB catalog fills in missing properties. Excludes attunement, grip, ammunition, charges.remaining, effects — those live in MODIFIER item_states[].

id.description: Sheet-local unique identifier for this item. All consumers reference items by this id.

category.description: Item category (weapon, armor, shield, gear, potion, scroll, wondrous, etc.).

quantity.description: How many the character holds. Used for ammunition stacks, torches, potions.

properties.description: Item/weapon property identifiers (two-handed, versatile, light, finesse, etc.).

versatile_damage.description: Weapon: damage dice when wielded two-handed, e.g. '1d10'.

base_ac.description: Armour: base AC before Dexterity modifier.

dex_cap.description: Armour: max Dex bonus to AC. null = uncapped (light). 0 = heavy armour adds no Dexterity.

ac_bonus.description: Shield or AC-granting item: bonus to AC.

spell_id.description: For spell scrolls: the spell catalog identifier on this scroll.

template_item.description: For templated items (+1 Weapon): the template catalog identifier (e.g. 'weapon-1').

base_item.description: For templated items: the base item catalog identifier.

charges.description: Maximum charges for reference only. Remaining lives in MODIFIER item_states[].

max.description: Maximum charges this item holds (e.g. Wand of Magic Missiles = 7). Reference only — the deriver reads this when populating MODIFIER item_states[].
